item.title: Bailing Hay with a Hesston 565
item.description: Laura Farms bails hay with a Hesston 565, showing a steady day of farm work and machinery in action.

media:content.media:title: Bailing Hay with a Hesston 565
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms bails hay with a Hesston 565, showing a steady day of farm work and machinery in action.

item.title: Saving an Abandoned Dozer from a Pond
item.description: Laura Farms takes on the challenge of recovering an abandoned dozer from a pond, showing the teamwork and determination behind farm machinery work.

media:content.media:title: Saving an Abandoned Dozer from a Pond
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes on the challenge of recovering an abandoned dozer from a pond, showing the teamwork and determination behind farm machinery work.

item.title: Laura Farms Buys a Round Baler
item.description: Laura Farms shares the excitement of buying a round baler and adding a new piece of machinery to the farm.

media:content.media:title: Laura Farms Buys a Round Baler
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares the excitement of buying a round baler and adding a new piece of machinery to the farm.

item.title: Camping Out of My Tractor on the Farm
item.description: Laura Farms shares a simple farm-life moment camping out of a tractor on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Camping Out of My Tractor on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a simple farm-life moment camping out of a tractor on the farm.

item.title: Fast Tractor Tire Change in the Field
item.description: Laura Farms shows a quick tractor tire change right in the field, keeping the work moving and the day on track.

media:content.media:title: Fast Tractor Tire Change in the Field
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shows a quick tractor tire change right in the field, keeping the work moving and the day on track.

item.title: Fixing a Flat in the Cornfield
item.description: Laura Farms handles a flat tire in the cornfield and keeps the day moving. A simple farm fix that shows steady work and everyday determination.

media:content.media:title: Fixing a Flat in the Cornfield
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms handles a flat tire in the cornfield and keeps the day moving. A simple farm fix that shows steady work and everyday determination.

item.title: Dad Helps Free a Stuck Ranger
item.description: Dad steps in to help get a stuck Ranger moving again, showing the teamwork and hands-on problem solving that keep farm life rolling.

media:content.media:title: Dad Helps Free a Stuck Ranger
media:content.media:description: Dad steps in to help get a stuck Ranger moving again, showing the teamwork and hands-on problem solving that keep farm life rolling.
